# Conflicting Edit Test

Test what happens when the EXACT text you highlighted is modified.

## Section 1: Highlight Target

**Trip 1 Instructions**: Highlight "annotation anchoring system" below.

The annotation anchoring system handles content changes. This exact phrase will be MODIFIED in Trip 2, creating a conflict with your highlight.

This text will shift down and be MODIFIED. We'll change it to uppercase to see how anchoring handles the conflict.
